meta.title: Daniel Rassomakhin — Vue / Nuxt Developer and Team Lead
meta.description: Portfolio of Daniel Rassomakhin, a frontend developer with 5+ years of commercial experience specializing in Vue 3, Nuxt and complex enterprise systems.

hero.status: Open to opportunities · Vue / Nuxt · Team Lead
hero.lead: Frontend developer with 5+ years of commercial experience. I architect complex Vue and Nuxt interfaces, lead teams and cover adjacent layers as a {accent} developer when needed.

about.title: I turn complex ideas into {accent}
about.p1: For more than 5 years, I have designed and launched enterprise and public-sector platforms from scratch where mistakes are expensive: digital signatures, role-based access, multi-step forms, heavy interactive dashboards and SVG data visualization.
about.p2: I take products from the idea stage to production: I build DDD and FSD architectures that can grow without turning into legacy within a year. As a Team Lead, I am responsible not only for my own code, but also for timelines, reviews and onboarding.
about.p3: I configure Docker and CI/CD, work confidently with backend teams and take on fullstack tasks when that speeds up the result without diluting focus.

skills.title: A stack for complex interfaces and product systems

work.title: Things I've built
work.nda: Commercial project · details limited by NDA

sigma.title: Energy Trading Marketplace
sigma.desc: An electricity trading marketplace with procurement lots, commercial bids, CryptoPro digital signatures, a market-depth chart and detailed data tables.

education.title: Education Platform
education.desc: An education platform built from scratch: test authoring and delivery, analytics, WYSIWYG editing, events, chat, purchases and role-based access.

bitcoin.title: Bitcoin Financial Services Landing
bitcoin.desc: A landing page for an institutional Bitcoin service with advanced animation, managed content, SEO, analytics and an automated delivery workflow.
bitcoin.imageAlt: Bitcoin financial services landing page interface

moex.title: Financial Monitoring Portal
moex.desc: A financial monitoring portal for a public-sector client featuring interactive SVG diagrams, KPI monitoring, large data tables, reports and GraphQL integrations.

irlix.title: Document Management System
irlix.desc: An internal public transport system with a file manager, hierarchical document catalogue, analytics dashboards and a redesigned landing page.

baccasoft.title: Business Process Management System
baccasoft.desc: An enterprise system for the mining and metals sector covering business processes, complex forms, filtering, chat and legacy product development.

fullstack.desc: Within a development team, owned the complete delivery cycle for an institutional Bitcoin landing page: from the interactive Next.js and GSAP frontend to Sanity CMS, SEO, analytics, Docker and CI/CD. Coordinated technical decisions and the product outcome as a whole.

energyLead.desc: Owned the architecture of core workflows for an energy trading marketplace, including CryptoPro signatures, complex data tables and ECharts visualizations. Maintained team delivery quality through code review, mentoring and release oversight.

educationLead.desc: Built an education platform from the ground up with DDD architecture, testing, analytics, content editing, purchases and role-based access. Led decomposition, code review and mentoring so the team could make durable technical decisions.

complexSystems.desc: As part of a development team, independently owned modules across a financial monitoring portal, a public transport document system and an industrial business-process platform. Aligned solutions with other developers and delivered SVG visualizations, GraphQL, dashboards and complex forms.

commercialStart.desc: Started in a team building commercial interfaces for corporate platforms, e-commerce and advertising services. Worked with other developers to turn designs into responsive products, integrate REST APIs and evolve Vue code while taking ownership of increasingly independent areas.

vue.title: Vue / Nuxt development
vue.desc: Vue 3, Nuxt 3/4, TypeScript, Pinia and Vue Query: architecture, performance and long-term product development.

systems.title: Complex business systems
systems.desc: Dashboards, SVG and charts, large data tables, multi-step forms, roles, REST / GraphQL and digital signatures.

landing.title: Landing pages, animation & SEO
landing.desc: Landing pages that convert: smooth animation (GSAP, Lottie), fast load times and SEO built in. Manage content yourself via headless CMS, with deployment automated.

product.title: Product launch from scratch
product.desc: I turn an idea into a working product — from analysis to release. I lay down scalable architecture (DDD / FSD) that holds up as you grow.

integrations.title: Integrations: API, realtime, e-signature
integrations.desc: I connect your frontend to any backend: REST, GraphQL, type-safe codegen from OpenAPI, real-time chat and legally binding e-signatures (CryptoPro).

leadership.title: Team Lead & processes
leadership.desc: Decomposition, planning, code review, mentoring, release workflows, Docker and CI/CD.

contact.title: Let's build{br}something {accent}
contact.lead: Open to frontend and team lead roles, project work and complex product challenges. Telegram and email are the easiest ways to reach me.

form.name: Your name
form.errorName: Name — at least 3 characters, letters only
form.errorContact: Enter a valid email or Telegram — e.g. {email} or {handle}
form.errorContactOwn: Those are my contacts — please leave your own

success.title: Request sent
success.text: Thank you! I'll get back to you within a day — usually via Telegram.
